indicators.title: Network Latency Index
indicators.summary: Aggregated latency percentile across all operational nodes, updated every 15 minutes.

indicators.title: citizen services load
indicators.summary: Daily request volume and failure rate for passport, registry, and identity verification services.

indicators.title: Transparency Backlog
indicators.summary: Open request backlog, median completion time, and exemption citation rate for FOI-style requests.

risks.title: Node Concentration Risk
risks.summary: 60% of traffic routes through three regional nodes. Mitigation requires mesh expansion and geographic redistribution.

risks.title: Privacy Compliance Drift
risks.summary: Schema changes in three active services exceed minimization thresholds. Remediation scheduled for Q3 rollout.

risks.title: Disinformation Response Readiness
risks.summary: Gap analysis of public-facing disinformation response playbooks across Communications and External Affairs.

foresight.title: Strategic Foresight Brief: Digital Sovereignty
foresight.summary: Multi-year outlook on protocol state resilience, node governance, and inter-network treaty frameworks.

foresight.title: Early Warning Dashboard Roadmap
foresight.summary: Proposed single-pane indicator dashboard with configurable alerting thresholds for Cabinet review.

foresight.title: Service Continuity Scenario Playbook
foresight.summary: Documented load-shedding, failover, and degraded-service procedures for pandemic-scale demand spikes.

pillars.title: Indicator Discipline
pillars.summary: Curated signal library with noise reduction and false-positive minimization.

pillars.title: Foresight Integration
pillars.summary: Scenario planning, red-teaming, and horizon scanning embedded in decisions.

pillars.title: Actionable Intelligence
pillars.summary: Structured briefings with confidence intervals, options, and decision deadlines.
